security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; media-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Offline pitch tuner, transcriber, and ear-training app for musicians.
bundle.longDescription: Pitch tuner, recorder, and analyzer for musicians. Live pitch detection with cents meter, FLAC capture, pYIN contour analysis, range and vibrato reports, polyphonic transcription with MIDI export, ear-training drills, and HTDemucs stem separation — all offline, on your machine.
